results.title: Gold on blue
results.creator_credit: Cecil Holmes, Peter Johnson and Film Australia
results.brief_description: A look at the training and life-styles of the young men who enter “Cresswell”, the Royal Australian Naval College, near Nowra, N.S.W. Shows various aspects of the college from which they will graduate as junior officers.

results.title: Going to school in Australia
results.creator_credit: Kenneth Mott, Austarama Television and Nicholas
results.brief_description: A film designed to instruct immigrants to Australia on the nature of the Australian and especially the Victorian education systems. Two representatives in the field of migrant education are questioned about how parents may proceed to enrol their children at school, the different kinds of schools in the Australian system, their various functions and facilities, adult education and several other facets of the education system. Narrated by Barry McQueen.

results.title: Going to school
results.creator_credit: David Gibson and Dept of Education, New Zealand
results.brief_description: Explores a child’s first days at school. This exciting experience has its problems, fears and joys. It also describes the parents and teachers reactions. Suitable for tertiary and teacher levels.

results.title: Going the distance
results.creator_credit: Paul Cowan, Jacques Bobet, Robert Verrall and National Film Board of Canada
results.brief_description: The official film of the XI Commonwealth Games held in Edmonton, Canada, in August 1978. An international sports event occurring every four years, the games draw hundreds of athletes from the many nations of the Commonwealth. Eight athletes from four continents were selected to illustrate the nature of individual effort. They were filmed in their home countries before the Games, and in competition in Edmonton, Canada.
results.creator_credit_for_label: Paul Cowan, Jacques Bobet, Robert Verrall and National Film Board of Canada

results.title: Going places
results.creator_credit: Charles Mapleston, Peter Bradford and World Wide Pictures
results.brief_description: Designed to set people talking about the whole problem of transportation. Eight independent experts in the field of transport discuss problems arising from the ever-increasing number of vehicles using Britain’s heavily congested roads. Points out how mobility is associated with danger, damage, noise, pollution and ugliness and the need to create a transport system which will improve both communications and the environment.

results.title: Goggles!
results.creator_credit: Isa Wickenhagen, Morton Schindel and Weston Woods Studios
results.brief_description: Peter finds a pair of motorcycle goggles without lenses. He and Archie set off with their treasure but run into some big boys who demand the goggles. Suspense mounts as Peter and Archie, with the help of Peter’s loyal daschund, Willie, attempt to outwit the bullies. Based on the book by Ezra Jack Keats.

results.title: Godavari
results.creator_credit: R.S. Junnerker, Jehangir Bhownagary and Documentary Films of India
results.brief_description: A description of the River Godavari which flows from the hills east of Bombay across northern India to the Bay of Bengal. Includes an account of various temples, shrines, towns and villages built at its source and along its banks.

results.title: The Ancestry of science: the god within
results.brief_description: The influence that contributed to early Greek philosophy and the beginnings of science. Shows the early philosophers seeking to rationalise the world around them; three explanations of the creation of the universe; the foreshadowing of modern quantitative chemistry.
